items.title: Our annual NFL draft prospect skill superlative list: The one player who excels at each trait
items.body_text: Strongest arm? Fastest offensive and defensive playmakers? Quickest first step? Let's hand out superlatives for this draft class.
items.author: Matt Bowen

items.title: College coaches pick 2026 NFL draft sleepers
items.body_text: We know the top talent in the draft, but who could surprise in the pros? We asked their college coaches.
items.author: Adam Rittenberg

items.title: Report: Ex-Canes DE Bain drove in fatal car crash
items.body_text: Former Miami defensive end and 2026 NFL draft prospect Rueben Bain Jr. was involved in an auto accident in 2024 in which a passenger later died because of injuries sustained in the crash, according to a report published on Sunday.
items.author: David Hale

items.title: Panel rules NFL teams didn't collude on QB deals
items.body_text: An appeals panel upheld a decision that there wasn't sufficient evidence of collusion by teams when negotiating the contracts of Kyler Murray, Lamar Jackson and Russell Wilson in 2022, according to a copy of the ruling obtained by multiple outlets.

items.title: Cowboys safety Bell arrested, faces drug charges
items.body_text: Cowboys safety Markquese Bell has been arrested and charged with possession of a controlled substance and marijuana, according to Collin County jail records.
items.author: Todd Archer

items.title: Former NFL WR Ginn charged with DWI in Texas
items.body_text: Former NFL wide receiver and current Aviators coach Ted Ginn Jr. was charged with driving while intoxicated in Tarrant County, Texas, on Saturday.
items.author: ESPN

items.title: Eagles get Packers WR Wicks for picks in trade
items.body_text: The Eagles have acquired wide receiver Dontayvion Wicks from the Packers for two draft picks.
items.author: Rob Demovsky

items.title: Sources: NYT investigating reporter's Vrabel ties
items.body_text: The Athletic is reinvestigating the coverage of NFL reporter Dianna Russini and the nature of her relationship with Patriots coach Mike Vrabel amid questions raised about the two this week, sources told ESPN.
items.author: Ben Strauss

items.title: Sources: Colts seeking to trade away CB Moore
items.body_text: The Colts and Kenny Moore II have agreed to seek a trade to find the veteran cornerback a new team, sources told ESPN.

items.title: Former Jets, Louisvile QB Nagle dies at age 57
items.body_text: Former Jets and Louisville quarterback Browning Nagle has died at age 57.
items.author: Rich Cimini

items.title: 🤖 How AI is pushing NFL draft preparations
items.body_text: When a prospect skips NFL combine workouts, teams can use artificial intelligence to project his measurables.

items.title: Eagles, A.J. Brown intrigue increases as NFL draft nears
items.body_text: The Eagles haven't been highly incentivized to move Brown to this point, in large part due to the financials.

items.title: 'Every detail is a big detail': Cardinals in tune with Mike LaFleur's expectations
items.body_text: Players said the new Cardinals coach struck the right tone in his first meeting with the team.
items.author: Josh Weinfuss

items.title: The NFL draft's biggest risers: Seven players who have boosted their stock

items.body_text: UFL co-owner Mike Repole promised expansion; the other city to join with OKC is still to be determined.
